_comment: Copy relevant values into your .env file. See project .env.example for all variables.

OPENAI_BASE_URL.description: Base URL for OpenAI or any compatible provider (OpenRouter, Azure OpenAI, Ollama, etc.)

AI_MODEL.description: Model name. Must support JSON mode (response_format: json_object).

MARKET_SIZING_EMAIL_TO.description: Email address that receives the approval request and final report.

NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_FROM.description: Sender address for approval and report emails.

COMPANY_NAME.description: Company name used in email subject lines.

node_placeholders_to_replace.description: The ID from your Google Sheet URL: docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/THIS_PART/edit

n8n_credentials_required.name: YOUR_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL
n8n_credentials_required.purpose: Authenticate LLM API calls. Header name: Authorization, value: Bearer <key>

n8n_credentials_required.name: YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
n8n_credentials_required.purpose: Send approval request and final report emails

n8n_credentials_required.name: YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEETS_CREDENTIAL
n8n_credentials_required.purpose: Optional: log each sizing run to a Google Sheet

google_sheet_setup.note: Create this sheet and add headers before enabling the Log node. Disable the Log node if not using Sheets.
